title: ESG Currents: How Climate Data Helps Homeowners Assess Costs
title_cn: ESG 潮流：气候数据如何帮助房主评估成本
summary: As climate change intensifies, physical risks to property are mounting. On this episode of ESG Currents, Bloomberg Intelligence sustainable-finance senior analysts Gail Glazerman and Andy Stevenson speak with Daryl Fairweather, chief economist of Redfin, about how homebuyers are responding to physical risks, the challenges for home affordability — especially insurance costs — and how markets are adapting, including signs of climate migration.

title: Vanguards of Healthcare: Bristol Myers Maps Oncology’s Next Act
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：百时美施贵宝规划肿瘤学的下一步
summary: “Neuroscience is what oncology was 20 years ago,” says Cristian Massacesi, Chief Medical Officer and Head of Development at Bristol Myers Squibb. Massacesi joins Bloomberg Intelligence pharmaceuticals analyst Sam Fazeli to discuss Bristol Myers’ push into neuroscience, including Alzheimer’s therapies aimed at tau, a protein tied to brain tangles in the disease. They also explore the company’s oncology pipeline, including PD-L1/VEGF bispecifics, next-generation antibody-drug conjugates and advanc

title: Oil Rebounds as Traders Await Signing of US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员等待美伊协议签署，油价反弹
summary: Oil recovered slightly after two days of stark losses, with prices still broadly pressured by a pending US-Iran interim peace deal that threatens to send barrels gushing back onto the market.

title: Bond Rally Fails to Allay Higher-for-Longer Rates Threat
title_cn: 债券反弹未能消除长期较高利率的威胁
summary: Governments around the world look to be facing lofty borrowing costs for at least the rest of the year, even as the fragile Middle East truce lowers energy prices and curbs inflationary fears.

title: G7 Aims to See China Supply No More Than 60% of Rare Earths
title_cn: G7希望中国稀土供应量不超过60%
summary: The Group of Seven countries have agreed that no single country should supply more than 60% of their imports of rare earths by 2030 in an effort to reduce their reliance on China.

title: Apple Investors Are Tired of AI Promises, Want Tangible Progress
title_cn: 苹果投资者厌倦了人工智能承诺，希望取得切实进展
summary: Apple Inc. investors are losing patience with the company’s talk about becoming a more formidable presence in artificial intelligence and want to start seeing some results.

title: Stocks, Bonds, Dollar Churn in Countdown to Fed: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市、债券、美元在美联储倒计时：市场总结
summary: Wall Street traders gearing up for the Federal Reserve decision refrained from making big moves as they waited to see whether new Chair Kevin Warsh will validate market bets on future rate hikes or lean against them.

title: Halkbank Iran Sanctions Case Tossed as Judge Grants DOJ Request
title_cn: Halkbank 伊朗制裁案因法官批准司法部请求而被搁置
summary: A federal judge allowed the Justice Department to formally drop a long-running criminal case against Turkish state-owned lender Turkiye Halk Bankasi AS for allegedly helping Iran move billions of dollars in violation of US sanctions.

title: Brazil’s Grilling Tradition Challenged by Beef Prices
title_cn: 巴西的烧烤传统受到牛肉价格的挑战
summary: Soaring prices for the world’s largest beef producer, Brazil, mean households will be buying less red meat when they gather to watch Brazil’s first game of the FIFA World Cup this Saturday.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/17/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/17/2026
summary:
Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg. 

Correct: video edited to remove incorrect graphic at 20:51. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Wealth: Rob Wallace
title_cn: 彭博财富：罗布·华莱士
summary: Rob Wallace oversees Stanford University's roughly $50 billion endowment as CEO of Stanford Management Company. Before entering the world of investing, he spent 16 years as a professional ballet dancer. On this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth with David Rubenstein, Wallace discusses his unconventional path to finance, the portfolio overhaul he led at Stanford, how he thinks about AI and private markets, and the challenges of investing for future generations. This interview was recorded April 9 in Palo Alto, CA. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s BSE to Unveil New Index to Boost Ethical Investing
title_cn: 印度疯牛病交易所将推出新指数以促进道德投资
summary: BSE Index Services Pvt. has introduced a measure of Indian stocks that are aligned with so-called “saatvik” principles in an effort to offer investors a choice based on ethical and cultural practices.

title: Haaland’s World Cup Debut Draws Sponsors Betting on US Stardom
title_cn: 哈兰德世界杯首秀吸引赞助商押注美国球星
summary: Last week, Erling Haaland sat with fans and watched the NHL’s Carolina Hurricanes close in on the Stanley Cup. One of the world’s best football players is unlikely to get away with such anonymity for much longer.

title: We're Entering a 'Summer of the Bond Market,' Goncalves Says
title_cn: 贡萨尔维斯表示，我们正在进入“债券市场的夏天”
summary: “We are entering a summer of the bond market,” MUFG chief macro strategist George Goncalves said on "Bloomberg Surveillance." He says falling oil prices will smooth the way for a rally in fixed income.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Retail Sales Surge in May Despite High Gasoline Prices
title_cn: 尽管汽油价格高企，美国 5 月份零售额仍大幅增长
summary: US retail sales jumped in May as the value of retail purchases rose 0.9% after a revised 0.4% increase in April as consumer demand remained resilient. The figures are not adjusted for inflation. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Has Potential to Spur Market Volatility, Fidelity Says
title_cn: 富达表示，沃什有可能刺激市场波动
summary: Investors from Fidelity say new Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh stands to stoke bond-market volatility by offering his views on inflation.

title: UK Needs 'Radical Change' Says Billionaire John Caudwell
title_cn: 亿万富翁约翰·考德威尔表示英国需要“彻底改变”
summary:
Keir Starmer is close to having been in office for two years, but his term has not been going to plan. The UK Prime Minister has seen sluggish economic growth, a collapse in popularity, and bond yields hitting highs not seen in decades. Now, many inside his own party wonder if a different leader and direction might be needed.
Voters go to the polls tomorrow in Makerfield to vote on if one likely contender Andy Burnham, will make it to parliament. John Caudwell is a the billionaire investor and founder of Phones4u. He was a lifelong Conservative supporter who switched to Labour in 2024. Joined Stephen Carroll and Lizzy Burden to shares his views on the outlook for the UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Selloff Seen as ‘Unwarranted’ by Rapidan’s McNally
title_cn: Rapidan 的麦克纳利认为石油抛售“毫无根据”
summary: Bob McNally, founder and president at Rapidan Energy Group, says oil is “oversold,” but he expects the markets to retrace as he examines reaction to the interim deal between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Lagarde Warns AI Is Huge Risk for Financial Stability
title_cn: 欧洲央行拉加德警告人工智能对金融稳定构成巨大风险
summary: Artificial intelligence can potentially lead to dangerous financial crises, and the European Central Bank is determined to ensure that doesn’t happen, President Christine Lagarde said.

title: Egypt’s Pound Becomes World’s Top Currency as Oil Shock Reverses
title_cn: 随着石油危机的逆转，埃及镑成为世界顶级货币
summary: Egypt’s pound has become the world’s best-performing currency after oil prices dropped sharply on a US-Iran agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a move expected to restore supply flows and ease inflation concerns.

title: Hedges Removed Due to Iran Deal Leave S&P Vulnerable on Fed Day
title_cn: 因伊朗协议而取消的对冲令标普在美联储日脆弱
summary: If traders are getting anxious ahead of Kevin Warsh’s first interest-rate meeting at the helm of the Federal Reserve, they aren’t really showing it. That type of sanguine posture can make the market vulnerable to near-term declines.

title: Stocks Rise Ahead of Fed Decision; US-Iran MOU Details; G7 Summit | Bloomberg Brief 6/17/2026
title_cn: 美联储决策前股市上涨；美国-伊朗谅解备忘录详情； G7峰会|彭博简报 2026 年 6 月 17 日
summary: US equity futures rise ahead of the Federal Reserve’s first policy decision under Chair Kevin Warsh. A reported draft memorandum between the US and Iran shows that Tehran will gain a major financial relief as part of the agreement. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook speaks to Synthesia CEO Victor Riparbelli at the G7 summit ahead of AI executives' lunch with G7 leaders. Ian Lyngen of BMO Capital Markets looks ahead to the Fed's rate decision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Premarket Movers for June 17, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 6 月 17 日美国盘前走势
summary: US equity-index futures are little changed ahead of the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate decision. Contracts on the S&P 500 Index are up 0.1% at 7:40 a.m. in New York.

title: Market Poised for 'Hawkish' Fed Chair Warsh, Lyngen Says
title_cn: 林根称市场已准备好迎接“鹰派”美联储主席沃什
summary: Ian Lyngen, head of US rates strategy at BMO Capital Markets, discusses what to expect from the Federal Reserve’s first policy decision under Chair Kevin Warsh. "The energy shock remains extremely topical for monetary policymakers and will probably ultimately drive the tone of what we hear from Warsh," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Defense Chief Challenges China’s Transparency
title_cn: 日本防卫大臣挑战中国的透明度
summary: Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi spoke with Bloomberg News' Alastair Gale in Tokyo about security in the Asia Pacific region. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Green Economy Tops $10 Trillion as Revenue Growth Picks Up
title_cn: 随着收入增长加快，绿色经济突破 10 万亿美元
summary: The green economy — the business lines of global listed companies that generate revenue from climate solutions — now boasts a record high market value of $10 trillion.

title: Starmer Hot Mic Moment Suggests India Trade Row Breakthrough
title_cn: Starmer 的热门麦克风时刻表明印度贸易争端取得突破
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer raised expectations that Britain has resolved a trade impasse with India, when he and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi were caught on a microphone at the G7 summit in France saying some form of agreement had been reached.

title: Warsh Faces Big Test, US & Iran Prepare for Deal Signing | The Opening Trade 6/17/2026
title_cn: 沃什面临重大考验，美国和伊朗准备签署协议开盘交易 6/17/2026
summary:
US stock futures and bonds climbed as oil fell further, with investors awaiting the Federal Reserve’s policy decision for fresh clues on the outlook for global interest rates.

Brent crude fell below $79 a barrel to a fresh three-month low. Prices slumped 15% over the last four sessions on bets the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will unleash a wave of supply and help ease concerns over inflation. 

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Total Oil Trading Gain Doubled to About $1 Billion Last Quarter
title_cn: 上季度石油交易总收益翻倍至约 10 亿美元
summary: TotalEnergies SE’s oil trading profits doubled to about $1 billion in the first quarter as the energy giant went on a crude buying spree in the run-up to the Iran war, Chief Executive Officer Patrick Pouyanné said.

title: EIB's Calviño Says Brexit Divided Europe's Capital Markets
title_cn: 欧洲投资银行的卡尔维诺表示，英国脱欧分裂了欧洲资本市场
summary: European Investment Bank President Nadia Calviño discusses the lender’s investment in security defense, tech and energy projects in an interview with Bloomberg TV’s Guy Johnson. She said the UK’s exit from the European Union is partly responsible for the EU’s failure to integrate its capital markets. “We shouldn’t underestimate the importance of Brexit,” Calviño said on Wednesday. “London was Europe’s financial market, and after Brexit we have divided our forces.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran to See Broad Financial Gains in US Peace Deal
title_cn: 伊朗将在美国和平协议中看到广泛的经济收益
summary: The US and Iran plan to formally sign a memorandum of understanding on Friday in Switzerland. The interim deal would allow Iran to start oil exports immediately and gain access to a $300 billion economic development program following negotiations for a permanent peace agreement. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone-Led Creditors Take Over Ailing Software Firm Medallia
title_cn: 黑石集团主导的债权人接管境况不佳的软件公司 Medallia
summary: Medallia Inc. is being taken over by a group of creditors led by Blackstone Inc. after its owner Thoma Bravo said it wasn’t going to inject fresh cash into the ailing software-as-a-service company.

title: SpaceX Extends Gains Into Fourth Day as Post-IPO Rally Hits 58%
title_cn: SpaceX 将涨幅延续至第四天，IPO后涨幅达到 58%
summary: SpaceX gained for a fourth straight day, cementing the company’s place among the world’s most valuable stocks after it surpassed Amazon.com Inc.

title: SoftBank Scales Back Latin America Tech Bets as Venture Capital Boom Fades
title_cn: 随着风险投资热潮的消退，软银缩减了对拉丁美洲科技的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is struggling to find startups in Latin America ready for major investments, underscoring how sharply the tech boom there has cooled since attracting record levels of venture capital only a few years ago.

title: Wrong-Way AI Trade Costs Florida Stock-Picker $50 Billion
title_cn: 错误的人工智能交易导致佛罗里达选股者损失 500 亿美元
summary: It was 180 degrees off the hot trade on Wall Street.

title: Google’s Gemini-Powered AI Home Speaker Goes on Sale June 25
title_cn: 谷歌 Gemini 驱动的人工智能家庭音箱将于 6 月 25 日上市
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said that its Google Home Speaker, a $100 device that includes deep integration with the company’s Gemini artificial intelligence platform, will be available starting June 25.

title: The Trump Phone Is More Novelty Than Serious Smartphone Contender
title_cn: 特朗普手机比真正的智能手机竞争者更新颖
summary: The Trump phone is finally here — sort of — and it bears little resemblance to the original pitch.

title: Macron Seeks Way Around Trump’s Ban on Anthropic’s AI Models
title_cn: 马克龙寻求绕过特朗普对 Anthropic 人工智能模型的禁令
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron will lead talks with Group of Seven leaders and tech executives to explore how to deploy the most advanced artificial intelligence models through so-called trusted partners, after the US blocked foreign nationals from accessing the technology.

title: JPMorgan’s David Kelly Says AI Boom Will Refuel Stock Rally
title_cn: 摩根大通的大卫·凯利表示人工智能的繁荣将推动股市上涨
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s asset-management arm is urging investors to stick with stocks and other higher-risk assets in the second half of 2026, arguing that an AI investment boom and resilient consumers should keep the expansion intact despite persistent inflation and a Federal Reserve on hold.

title: Bezos Says New Glenn Explosion Was 'Rough Moment'
title_cn: 贝索斯称新格伦爆炸是“艰难的时刻”
summary: Jeff Bezos, the founder of Amazon.com Inc. and rocket company Blue Origin, says the explosion of its New Glenn rocket "was a rough moment," adding it was "a gut punch" for the whole team involved. The rocket exploded in Florida in May. (Source: VivaTech 2026)

title: China Plans Mechanism to Evaluate AI Impacts on Job Market
title_cn: 中国计划建立人工智能对就业市场影响评估机制
summary: China is planning a mechanism to assess the impact of artificial intelligence on the job market, highlighting Beijing’s growing concerns over disruptions to the livelihood of its citizens from the technology.

title: SpaceX Venture Backers Debate When to Cash Out
title_cn: SpaceX 风险投资者争论何时兑现
summary: Some longtime investors say they’ll hold their ever-more valuable shares

title: An Essential Reading List on the Short and Tumultuous History of Decentralized Finance
title_cn: 关于去中心化金融短暂而动荡的历史的重要阅读清单
summary: Cornell professor Eswar Prasad’s recommendations are anything but academic.

title: Uber to Offer Robotaxis in Houston With Lucid and Nuro, Posing Challenge to Waymo
title_cn: Uber 将在休斯顿推出 Lucid 和 Nuro 机器人出租车，对 Waymo 构成挑战
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. will offer driverless robotaxi rides in Houston in vehicles developed by Lucid Group Inc. and Nuro Inc., setting it up to challenge Waymo in the fourth-largest US city.

title: Blue Origin Says It Will Launch a New Glenn Rocket This Year
title_cn: 蓝色起源表示今年将发射新的格伦火箭
summary: Blue Origin is already rebuilding the Florida launch site where its New Glenn rocket exploded last month, making way for the space company to fly again this year and rejuvenate its ambitions to challenge SpaceX.

title: Poland Invests $11 Million in ElevenLabs to Build AI Tech Hub
title_cn: 波兰向 ElevenLabs 投资 1100 万美元建设人工智能技术中心
summary: Poland has acquired a stake in artificial intelligence voice company ElevenLabs, as the country hopes to become a major European AI hub.

title: Bubble Risks Are Rising as AI Borrowing Balloons
title_cn: 随着人工智能借气球，泡沫风险不断上升
summary: Some debt of AI players is better than others.

title: UK Accused of Failing to Block Illegal Casinos in Crackdown
title_cn: 英国被指控在打击行动中未能阻止非法赌场
summary: Britain has been urged to bolster its efforts to clamp down on illegal gambling sites after a report found users were able to access unlicensed online casinos.

title: AI Leaders Including Altman, Amodei Set to Attend G7
title_cn: Altman、Amodei 等人工智能领袖将出席 G7
summary: Artificial Intelligence industry leaders including OpenAI's Sam Altman and Anthropic's Dario Amodei are set to attend the Group of Seven Summit in France on Wednesday. Oliver Crook reports from Evian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore’s Sea Tests AI Chatbot Migoo in Quiet US Foray
title_cn: 新加坡海上测试人工智能聊天机器人 Migoo 悄悄进军美国
summary: Singapore internet leader Sea Ltd. is rolling out a generative-AI chatbot in regions including the US, marking its maiden foray into the highly competitive American consumer market and accelerating its artificial intelligence push.

title: Asia Reports Sharp Rise in Cybercrimes and Scams, Interpol Says
title_cn: 国际刑警组织称亚洲网络犯罪和诈骗急剧增加
summary: Illegal cyber activities accounted for around a third of all crimes recorded in some Asian countries, with scams the most widespread and financially damaging, according to a new Interpol report.

title: General Atlantic in Talks to Lead Round for China’s Kling AI
title_cn: General Atlantic 正在洽谈领投中国 Kling AI 的回合
summary: Kuaishou Technology is in discussions with General Atlantic to lead a first round of financing for its video AI arm, seeking to secure a major US backer ahead of an initial public offering.

title: Singapore’s Electronics Exports Jump by Record on AI Demand Boom
title_cn: 人工智能需求旺盛，新加坡电子产品出口创历史新高
summary: Singapore’s electronic exports last month rose by the most on record on robust global demand for artificial intelligence-related equipment.

title: Nasdaq Private Market Alleges Rival Hiive Stole Technology
title_cn: 纳斯达克私募市场指控竞争对手 Hiive 窃取技术
summary: Trading platform Nasdaq Private Market alleged that its Vancouver-based competitor Hiive has stolen trade secrets and infringed on its intellectual property in a lawsuit.

title: BOK Warns AI-Driven Bonus Windfalls May Stoke Broader Inflation
title_cn: 韩国银行警告人工智能驱动的意外奖金可能会引发更广泛的通货膨胀
summary: South Korea’s artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom may wind up complicating the inflation outlook, with the central bank warning that soaring bonuses at major technology firms could fuel broader wage growth and stronger consumer demand.

title: China Watchdog Urges More IPOs From AI, Hong Kong Listed Firms
title_cn: 中国监管机构敦促人工智能和香港上市公司进行更多IPO
summary: China’s top securities regulator pledged to welcome more domestic listings from artificial intelligence developers as well as Hong Kong traded firms to bolster onshore capital markets.

title: Top Philippine Fintech GCash Owner Wins Approval for Jumbo IPO
title_cn: 菲律宾顶级金融科技公司 GCash 的 Jumbo IPO 获批
summary: The company behind GCash, the Philippines’ top fintech firm, has secured approval from its board and shareholders for what could be the nation’s largest initial public offering.

title: Startup Backed by Ex-Google CEO Debuts Robot, LG Partnership
title_cn: 由前谷歌首席执行官支持的初创公司首次推出机器人，LG 合作
summary: A startup backed by former Google Chief Executive Officer Eric Schmidt unveiled an industrial robot powered by artificial intelligence, as investors pile into the emerging field of humanoids.

title: Lingyi Seeks to Raise Up to $1.1 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: 灵益寻求在香港上市筹集至多11亿美元
summary: China’s Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. has started taking investor orders for a Hong Kong listing that may raise as much as HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion).

title: HSBC’s Jain on Hormuz Strait Reopening
title_cn: 汇丰银行的贾恩谈霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
summary:
Parash Jain, Global Head of Transport and Logistics at HSBC, says shipping companies remain in “wait-and-see” mode as the Strait of Hormuz edges closer to reopening under a US–Iran agreement.
He notes the next 40–50 days will be critical in determining whether more vessels can pass through, as de-mining operations are still underway. He does not expect significant movement in the short term.
He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Faces Cabinet Showdown in Days After Crucial By-Election
title_cn: 关键补选后几天，斯塔默面临内阁摊牌
summary: Supporters of Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham expect senior members of Keir Starmer’s cabinet to tell the UK prime minister to agree a handover of power in the coming days, in an attempt to make it impossible for him to continue in post.

title: FBI Says Drone Plot at White House Foiled by Mom’s Call
title_cn: 联邦调查局称白宫无人机阴谋被妈妈的电话挫败
summary: Tycen Proper’s parents got worried after their 19-year-old son started communicating with “random” people online. They called law enforcement after he spent $3,000 of his graduation money on ballistic armor plates, a new shotgun and “lots” of ammunition, according to authorities.

title: US Hails Deal That Defers War Goals and Gives Iran Relief
title_cn: 美国赞扬推迟战争目标并给予伊朗救济的协议
summary: The Trump administration hailed its interim peace deal with Iran that’s meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, even as hawks in the US pointed to the billions of dollars of economic gains set to come Tehran’s way.

title: UK Hands Out Largest Ever Fine for Russian Sanctions Breach
title_cn: 英国因俄罗斯违反制裁行为开出有史以来最大的罚款
summary: The UK fined a unit of Sabre Corp. more than £1 million ($1.3 million) for breaching sanctions, the largest penalty leveled since sanctions were introduced following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022.

title: Fujimori Closes in on Peru Presidency as Final Ballots Tallied
title_cn: 随着最终选票的统计，藤森即将当选秘鲁总统
summary: Keiko Fujimori is close to victory in her fourth bid for Peru’s presidency even as she trails in the domestic vote.

title: $1 Billion+ Tax Giveaways: The Backlash Against Data Center Incentives
title_cn: 超过 10 亿美元的税收减免：对数据中心激励措施的强烈反对
summary: States have been competing to attract AI data centers, offering tax breaks to companies like Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft. Now Georgia is at the center of a growing debate over whether those incentives are still worth the cost. (Produced and Edited by Paul Detrick; Senior Producer Andrew Satter; Executive Producer Josh Block)  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Milei’s Cabinet Chief Claims to Be the Crypto Investor Nobody Knew
title_cn: Milei 的内阁首长声称自己是无人知晓的加密货币投资者
summary: Manuel Adorni, one of President Javier Milei’s most trusted aides, claimed last week that an all-in bet on Bitcoin over a decade ago has funded a luxurious lifestyle that is now under scrutiny.

title: Trump’s Iran Nuclear Deal Risks Falling Short of Obama Version
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗核协议有达不到奥巴马版本的风险
summary: US President Donald Trump’s emerging nuclear accord with Iran risks securing fewer restrictions than the deal negotiated by the administration of Barack Obama — one he derided and later scrapped.

title: Bankman-Fried Quest for Trump Pardon Hits Congress Pushback
title_cn: 班克曼-弗里德寻求特朗普赦免遭到国会抵制
summary: US senators from both political parties are urging President Donald Trump to reject FTX co-founder Sam Bankman Fried’s pleas for a pardon after the cryptocurrency fraudster applied for clemency last week.

title: Everything You Need to Know About the Trump Phone
title_cn: 关于特朗普手机你需要知道的一切
summary: Trump Mobile's first smartphone is finally here. Samantha Kelly breaks down why even the president's biggest fans may want to consider an alternative. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Estonia to Grant AI Bots Digital IDs to Control Access
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚将授予人工智能机器人数字ID来控制访问
summary: Estonia plans to assign personal identification numbers to AI assistants in an effort to better control and limit the kinds of access and authority such bots possess as they carry out work on behalf of human beings and businesses.

title: Why Trump’s Intel Pick is Caught Up in a Wider Fight
title_cn: 为什么特朗普的英特尔选择陷入了更广泛的斗争
summary: Jay Clayton is at the middle of a major proxy battle in Washington

title: Finland Lifts Nuclear Weapons Ban as Security Risks Grow
title_cn: 随着安全风险的增加，芬兰取消了核武器禁令
summary: Finland passed laws lifting a ban on nuclear weapons, a major shift for the Nordic nation as it deepens its integration with defense alliance NATO.

title: Inside the Mind of Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
title_cn: Anthropic 首席执行官 Dario Amodei 的内心世界
summary: Emily Chang sits down with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei in a wide-ranging interview discussing his San Francisco roots, the race against OpenAI, the Pentagon standoff and AI’s endgame. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Chief Reaches Out to Moscow to Set Up Back Channel to Putin
title_cn: 欧盟主席与莫斯科建立联系普京的秘密渠道
summary: European Council President Antonio Costa has made contact with the Kremlin in an effort to engage Russian President Vladimir Putin in discussions about how to end the war in Ukraine, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Orban’s Media Empire Implodes After Hungary Election Defeat
title_cn: 匈牙利大选失败后欧尔班的媒体帝国崩溃
summary: Viktor Orban’s vast media empire, which played a key role in sustaining the Hungarian nationalist leader in power for the past 16 years, collapsed two months after a historic election defeat.

title: US-Iran Deal Signing Will Be Attended by Qatar and Pakistan, Switzerland Says
title_cn: 瑞士称卡塔尔和巴基斯坦将出席美伊协议签署
summary: The signing of the interim peace deal between the US and Iran on Friday will also be attended by representatives of Pakistan and Qatar, the Swiss government said.

title: Finland Government Survives Vote Over Climbing Youth Joblessness
title_cn: 芬兰政府在青年失业率攀升问题上幸免于难
summary: Finland’s government prevailed in a confidence vote in parliament brought by opposition parties concerned over youth unemployment and young people’s weakening faith in the future.

title: The British MP Trying to Outflank Farage With Musk’s Help
title_cn: 英国议员试图在马斯克的帮助下包抄法拉奇
summary: When Rupert Lowe was ejected from Reform UK in early 2025 over alleged bullying and threatening behavior, party leader Nigel Farage thought he was cutting loose a liability. Instead, he created one of a different kind.

title: Obama Seeks to Defend, Define Presidential Legacy With $850 Million Center
title_cn: 奥巴马斥资 8.5 亿美元建设中心，寻求捍卫和定义总统遗产
summary: The 44th president returns to stage with his party facing critical midterms.

title: Japan’s Defense Chief Challenges China’s Military Spending Data
title_cn: 日本防卫大臣质疑中国军费数据
summary: Japan’s Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi questioned the accuracy of China’s official military spending figures in a fresh sign that Tokyo is taking a tougher line in response to Beijing’s claims that its regional rival is pursuing “new militarism.”

title: NATO to Boost Air Defenses in Turkey With Italian SAMP/T System
title_cn: 北约将利用意大利 SAMP/T 系统加强土耳其的防空
summary: The North Atlantic Treaty Organization will deploy an Italian SAMP/T missile-defense system to a key Turkish air base in central Anatolia, according to the Turkish defense ministry, to bolster the alliance’s air defenses.

title: Trump Says Nomination of US Intel Director Should Be Delayed
title_cn: 特朗普称应推迟提名美国英特尔总监
summary: President Donald Trump pressured Senate Republicans to delay confirming Jay Clayton as his next intelligence director, throwing a wrench into leaders’ plans to quickly install him before loyalist Bill Pulte could take the position on an acting basis.

title: Taiwan Threatens Retaliation After Kenya ‘Brazenly’ Bars Scholar
title_cn: 肯尼亚“公然”禁止学者 台湾威胁报复
summary: Taiwan threatened to retaliate after Kenya “brazenly” blocked its participation at a global maritime event and detained a delegate from the island for 20 hours, actions Taipei blamed on China.

title: Equatorial Guinea Targets State Firms in Clampdown on Waste
title_cn: 赤道几内亚以国有企业为目标打击废物
summary: Equatorial Guinea has ordered a review of more than 50 state companies and agencies, broadening a government crackdown on waste after the cabinet resigned after failing to meet performance targets.
